hero.title: Memorise the Quran with a calmer, sharper practice loop.
hero.desc: Mutqin brings your ayahs, recordings, AI checks, revision flow, and weak-spot insights into one focused workspace so every session ends with a clear next step.
hero.problemText: Memorisation breaks down when weak ayahs, recordings, and review plans live in separate places.
hero.solutionText: Practise in small ranges, check recitation and recall, then review the exact ayahs that need attention.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade only when you need deeper recitation feedback, history, and coaching tools.

faq.title: Answers before you start
faq.subtitle: A quick overview of how Mutqin supports recitation, memorisation, and long-term retention.

whatIsMutqin.question: What is Mutqin?
whatIsMutqin.answer: Mutqin is a Quran memorisation and recitation workspace that combines practice tools, recordings, review signals, and progress tracking in one place.

howMemorisation.question: How does memorisation work?
howMemorisation.answer: You choose a surah and ayah range, repeat in small blocks, and use practice tools like blur, chaining, and saved sessions to strengthen recall gradually.

howAiFeedback.question: How does AI feedback work?
howAiFeedback.answer: AI feedback listens after you practise, highlights likely weak or missed words, and gives you a clearer next repetition instead of a vague overall score.

whatIsPro.question: What is Pro?
whatIsPro.answer: Pro is the full Mutqin plan for students who want AI recitation review, AI memorisation checks, advanced analytics, unlimited saved sessions, and deeper planning tools.

howRevision.question: How does revision work?
howRevision.answer: Mutqin tracks weak ayahs, recent practice, and due reviews so you can revisit what is most likely to slip before it turns into a larger backlog.

contact.subtitle: Questions about billing, memorisation workflows, or product feedback can come through here.

techniques.focusDescription: Focus Mode dims all non-active verses, helping you concentrate on the current ayah without distractions.
techniques.chainingOffDescription: Play the selected ayahs in order without chaining.
techniques.chainingCumulativeDescription: Build longer runs by adding one ayah at a time.
techniques.chainingLinkingHint: Practice ayahs individually, then in pairs.
techniques.chainingCumulativeHint: Start with first ayah, then add one more each time.
techniques.chainingOffSub: Play the selected ayahs in order without chaining.
techniques.chainingCumulativeSub: Build longer connected runs from the first ayah outward.
techniques.chainingLinkingSub: Train the transition between neighbouring ayahs.
techniques.chainingOffPreview: Flow: selected ayahs in order, each ayah repeated {count} time(s).
techniques.chainingCumulativePreview: Cumulative flow: repeat 1, then 1-2, then 1-2-3. Each block repeats {count} time(s).
techniques.chainingLinkingPreview: Linking flow: repeat the current ayah, the next ayah, then both together. Each step repeats {count} time(s).
techniques.focusActiveDescription: Non-active verses are softened so the current ayah stays central.
techniques.blurActiveDescription: Upcoming verses are hidden with {px}px blur for active recall.
techniques.anchorOffDescription: Anchor mode off · use key words as memory hooks
techniques.anchorUsingDescription: Using {anchors} as mental anchors for each ayah
techniques.chainingWhyCumulative: Use when you want to build longer runs by adding one ayah at a time.
techniques.chainingWhyLinking: Use when you want to strengthen transitions between neighboring ayahs.
techniques.chainingNextCumulative: Next: add one ayah to the block

analytics.streakDesc: Active study days in a row.
analytics.noDataDetail: Start a session to build analytics

guided.reviewBodySuffix: Keep your tongue, eyes, and heart together on this ayah.

about.heroTitle: A structured path to mastering the Qur'an
about.heroDesc: Mutqin is designed to help you memorise, revise, and retain the Qur'an with clarity and consistency — supported by intelligent guidance and gentle correction.
about.purposeDesc: To make Qur'an memorisation structured, sustainable, and deeply personal.
about.approachDesc: AI-supported learning that respects traditional teaching methods.
about.outcomeDesc: Stronger retention, consistent revision, and improved accuracy.
about.verse: "Indeed, We have made the Qur'an easy to remember." — 54:17
about.title: About Mutqin

aboutUs.title: About Us
aboutUs.less_friction_clearer_progress_better_re: Less friction, clearer progress, better return points.
aboutUs.session_setup_is_simple_enough_for_daily: Session setup is simple enough for daily use.
aboutUs.revision_signals_help_learners_revisit_w: Revision signals help learners revisit what needs attention.
aboutUs.the_interface_stays_focused_instead_of_o: The interface stays focused instead of overwhelming.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.make_consistent_quran_practice_easier_to: Make consistent Quran practice easier to understand.
mission.beginners_should_know_what_to_do_in_the_: Beginners should know what to do in the first minute.
mission.weak_ayahs_should_surface_before_they_be: Weak ayahs should surface before they become larger gaps.
mission.the_product_should_support_teachers_hala: The product should support teachers, halaqah, and personal routines.
mission.make_the_first_minute_simple_enough_for_: Make the first minute simple enough for beginners and steady enough for returning learners.
mission.surface_weak_ayahs_before_they_turn_into: Surface weak ayahs before they turn into larger review gaps that are harder to recover from.
mission.fit_naturally_alongside_a_teacher_halaqa: Fit naturally alongside a teacher, halaqah, or personal routine without creating unnecessary noise.

donate.title: Support Mutqin
donate.fund_the_next_practical_improvements_stu: Fund the next practical improvements students feel immediately.
donate.help_with_ongoing_improvements_maintenan: Help with ongoing improvements, maintenance, and careful polishing across the platform.
donate.support_steady_iteration_on_onboarding_r: Support steady iteration on onboarding, revision, and usability with a predictable contribution.
donate.back_focused_improvements_for_a_specific: Back focused improvements for a specific part of the Mutqin experience that needs extra attention.
donate.if_you_want_to_support_mutqin_contact_us: If you want to support Mutqin, contact us with the subject "Donation".

hifzPlan.choose_how_many_new_ayahs_you_want_to_le: Choose how many new ayahs you want to learn each day.
hifzPlan.pick_the_pace_that_feels_realistic_for_y: Pick the pace that feels realistic for your daily routine.
hifzPlan.tell_mutqin_what_to_focus_on_first_durin: Tell Mutqin what to focus on first during each session.
hifzPlan.choose_how_much_checking_and_guidance_yo: Choose how much checking and guidance you want during practice.
hifzPlan.choose_how_many_repeats_which_reciter_an: Choose how many repeats, which reciter, and the playback speed for each ayah.
hifzPlan.review_todays_pace_then_start_and_let_mu: Review today's pace, then start and let Mutqin guide the first session automatically.
hifzPlan.when_you_start_the_timer_audio_and_ayah_: When you start, the timer, audio, and ayah highlighting all begin automatically.

light.title: Light
light.subtitle: 1-3 ayahs/day
light.detail: A lighter workload for busy days, with more time for careful revision and steady confidence.

balanced.title: Balanced
balanced.subtitle: 3-5 ayahs/day
balanced.detail: Maintain a steady pace with enough revision to strengthen long-term memory.

intensive.title: Intensive
intensive.subtitle: 5-10 ayahs/day
intensive.detail: Move faster through memorisation while accepting a heavier daily revision load.

light.title: Light
light.subtitle: Low pressure, easy to maintain.
light.detail: Best for a calm routine where consistency matters more than speed.

balanced.title: Balanced
balanced.subtitle: Moderate pace and revision.
balanced.detail: A practical daily rhythm for new ayahs, review, and long-term retention.

intensive.title: Intensive
intensive.subtitle: Higher pace, stronger commitment.
intensive.detail: Designed for faster progress with tighter daily structure and more review.

newPriority.title: New Memorisation First
newPriority.subtitle: Start with fresh ayahs.
newPriority.detail: Keeps momentum high while still scheduling reviews after new work.

revisionPriority.title: Revision First
revisionPriority.subtitle: Protect what you already know.
revisionPriority.detail: Places older memorisation first so retention stays strong before adding more.

mixed.title: Mixed Flow
mixed.subtitle: Balanced new and review work.
mixed.detail: Blends new memorisation and revision into one manageable daily plan.

weakAyahFocus.title: Weak Ayah Focus
weakAyahFocus.subtitle: Repair fragile memorisation.
weakAyahFocus.detail: Gives extra attention to ayahs that need reinforcement before they become backlog.

gentle.title: Gentle Guidance
gentle.subtitle: Light checking and softer feedback.
gentle.detail: Best if you want a lighter workload while building confidence and consistency.

standard.title: Standard Support
standard.subtitle: Balanced checking and practical feedback.
standard.detail: Best for most learners who want useful correction without slowing the session down.

highPrecision.title: High Precision Mode
highPrecision.subtitle: Closer checking for stricter mastery.
highPrecision.detail: Best when you want tighter correction and can handle a more demanding session.

validation.dailyTarget: Set a realistic number of new ayahs for each day.
validation.validRange: Enter a valid ayah range or leave both range fields blank.
validation.repeatsRequired: Choose how many times each ayah should repeat.
validation.reciterRequired: Choose a reciter before you continue.

helpLearning.title: Help & Learning
helpLearning.subtitle: Learn how to use Mutqin's tools to memorise more effectively.

tajweed.title: Tajweed Rules
tajweed.description: Tajweed is the set of rules that helps you recite the Quran correctly and beautifully. Mutqin highlights these rules so you can recognise and practise them while memorising.
tajweed.bestFor: Students improving pronunciation and recitation quality.

srs.title: Smart Revision (SRS)
srs.description: Mutqin automatically reminds you to review verses at the right time so they stay strong in your memory. Difficult verses appear more often, while stronger verses are reviewed less frequently.
srs.bestFor: Long-term retention and preventing memorisation loss.

techniques.title: Memorisation Techniques
techniques.description: Choose the method that helps you stay steady, then adjust it as your range becomes more familiar.
techniques.bestFor: Students discovering which learning style works best for them.

repetition.label: Repetition Method
repetition.text: Repeat the same verse multiple times before moving on.

linking.label: Linking Method
linking.text: Connect each verse to the next to improve flow and continuity.

cumulative.label: Cumulative Method
cumulative.text: Continuously add new verses while revising previous ones.

layouts.title: Reading Layouts
layouts.description: Switch between two reading styles depending on the device and the kind of memorisation you want to do.
layouts.bestFor: Choosing the reading experience that feels most natural to you.

stacked.label: Stacked Layout
stacked.text: Displays each verse in a simple vertical format that is easier to follow on mobile devices.

mushaf.label: Mushaf Layout
mushaf.text: Displays verses in a traditional Mushaf-inspired style for students who prefer familiar page memorisation.

aiRecitation.title: AI Recitation
aiRecitation.description: AI Recitation listens to your recitation and provides instant feedback to help you identify mistakes and improve accuracy while memorising.
aiRecitation.bestFor: Students who want guided practice and immediate feedback.

talqinMode.title: Talqin Mode Guide
talqinMode.description: Talqin Mode automates the listen, pause, repeat, and extend cycle after you submit a practice session, so the timing stays consistent without extra manual control.
talqinMode.bestFor: Students building verse retention through guided listening and repetition.
talqinMode.workflowTitle: Talqin Workflow Guide (Listen, Pause, Repeat, Extend)
talqinMode.workflowIntro: Activated seamlessly right after you submit a practice session. The platform handles the timing so you can focus entirely on your retention:
talqinMode.workflowListenText: The app streams the correct pronunciation of the verse. Focus on Tajweed tracking.
talqinMode.workflowPauseText: The audio pauses automatically. A live on-screen alert prompts you to recite what you just heard.
talqinMode.workflowExtendText: The sequence systematically links verses together to build long-term memory capacity automatically.

manualAssessment.title: Manual Assessment
manualAssessment.description: Manual Assessment allows you to evaluate your own memorisation after each session and track your confidence and progress over time.
manualAssessment.bestFor: Students who prefer self-reflection and independent revision.
